docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KRISS MIRANDA, AGENT FOR BOF FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOF COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,540.00 FILED BY BOF COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT VIADNES, CLAIRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. BY VISITING JUGDE: JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BOF COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CLAIRE VIADNES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
